ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "age_band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age band of the claimant */,
  "assessed_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals assessed for potential eligibility */,
  "eligible_population" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals potentially eligible */,
  "total_claims" INTEGER /* Total number of claims made */,
  "total_claim_value" REAL /* Total value of claims made in millions of pounds */,
  "average_claim_value" REAL /* Average value of claims in pounds */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the claim belongs to */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., initial, revision) */,
  "claim_submission_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current claim status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_status_id") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_age_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_band_id") REFERENCES age_bands ("age_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_bands" (
  "age_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age band */,
  "age_band_name" TEXT /* Name of the age band (e.g., 16-24) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age band */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_age_bands" (
  "program_age_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-age band mapping */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "age_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_age_band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_age_bands_age_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_band_id") REFERENCES age_bands ("age_band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_age_bands_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_programs" (
  "claim_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim-program link */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_programs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claimants" (
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claimant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the claimant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the claimant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the claimant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the claimant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the claimant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the claimant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claimant_claims" (
  "claimant_claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claimant-claim link */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claimant */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claimant_claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claimant_claims_claimant_id FOREIGN KEY ("claimant_id") REFERENCES claimants ("claimant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claimant_claims_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_programs" (
  "user_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-program link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_programs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., proof of income, identification) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_documents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_notes_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "amount_dispensed" REAL /* Amount dispensed in pounds */,
  "decision_maker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_decisions_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_decisions_decision_maker_id FOREIGN KEY ("decision_maker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the disbursement was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount disbursed in pounds */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "disbursed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the disbursement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_disbursements_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_disbursements_disbursed_by FOREIGN KEY ("disbursed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_reviews_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  "revision_status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_revisions_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_revisions_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_feedback_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_audit_log" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_audit_log_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_audit_log_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_notifications_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., processing time, approval rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_metrics_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_reports_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
